description: AI academic writing assistant in your IDE, helping with research planning, literature review, paper structure, polishing, citations, and reviewer responses with your permission every step of the way.
walkthrough.title: Meet LingInk, your academic writing partner
walkthrough.description: LingInk helps turn research ideas into structured, polished papers. Here are 5 ways to put it to work:
walkthrough.step1.title: Start with a Research Goal
walkthrough.step1.description: Tell LingInk your topic, draft, or review need. It plans, asks clarifying questions, and keeps the writing task focused.
walkthrough.step2.title: Let LingInk Understand Your Paper
walkthrough.step2.description: Point LingInk to your manuscript, notes, references, or project files. It builds context before suggesting revisions.
walkthrough.step3.title: Use Strong AI Models for Academic Work
walkthrough.step3.description: LingInk connects to leading models (Anthropic, Gemini, OpenAI & more) so you can choose the right balance of reasoning, cost, and privacy.
walkthrough.step4.title: Extend with Research Tools (MCP)
walkthrough.step4.description: Connect literature databases, citation tools, search APIs, and other external services through MCP.
walkthrough.step5.title: You're Always in Control
walkthrough.step5.description: Review LingInk's plans, suggested edits, and file changes. Approve changes before they happen. No surprises.
activitybar.title: LingInk 灵砚
command.cline.abortGitCommitMessage: Generate Commit Message with LingInk - Stop
command.cline.jupyterGenerateCell: Generate Research Notebook Cell with LingInk
config.title: LingInk
